faqs.question: How long does Instagram growth take?
faqs.answer: It depends on your niche, content quality, consistency, and audience.

faqs.question: Do hashtags still help?
faqs.answer: Relevant hashtags can improve discoverability but are only one part of a broader strategy.

faqs.question: Should I post every day?
faqs.answer: Consistency is generally more important than frequency alone.
